text.title: Agency Niche Positioning Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Agency Niche Positioning output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: ≥3 closed projects in the vertical with revenue + outcome
ordered list of pages/case studies to rewrite, archive, or remove
90 days from publish; triggers r5 review

forbidden.pattern: niche_statement uses 'full-service' or 'we also do' phrasing
vertical_evidence is empty AND niche is aspirational
refusal_rubric only defines budget floor (industries_out also required)
portfolio_rewrite_plan leaves >5 off-niche case studies on homepage

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: niche_statement populated with a typed value
vertical_evidence populated with a typed value
refusal_rubric populated with a typed value
portfolio_rewrite_plan populated with a typed value
review_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
